qa.question: Confirm the single loan amount that should be identical across the urla 1003, form 1008, closing disclosure, loan estimate.
qa.question_rephrased: The urla 1003, form 1008, closing disclosure, and loan estimate should all carry one matching loan amount — what is that figure?

qa.question: What is the highest daily ending balance shown on the bank statement's daily-balance chart?
qa.question_rephrased: Looking at the daily-balance chart on the bank statement, which daily ending balance is the largest?

qa.question: On which page (1-based) does the Closing Disclosure begin?
qa.question_rephrased: Counting pages from 1, what is the starting page number of the Closing Disclosure?

qa.question: On the bank statement's daily-balance chart, how much did the balance change from the start to the end of the period?
qa.question_rephrased: Reading the bank statement's daily-balance chart, by what amount did the balance move between the first and last day of the period?

qa.question: What is the borrower's total monthly debt obligation per the credit report — the sum of the monthly payments of every non-mortgage tradeline?
qa.question_rephrased: According to the credit report, if you add up the monthly payments on all of the borrower's tradelines other than mortgages, what total monthly debt obligation do you get?

qa.question: What is the annual flood-insurance premium for the subject property?
qa.question_rephrased: For the subject property, how much is the yearly premium charged for flood insurance?

qa.question: What is the borrower's employer-sponsored pension vesting percentage?
qa.question_rephrased: What percent of the borrower's employer-sponsored pension has vested?

qa.question: Which checking statement contains the most transactions, and how many?
qa.question_rephrased: Among the checking statements, which one logs the greatest number of transactions, and what is that count?

qa.question: Sum the ending balances of every checking-account statement in the file.
qa.question_rephrased: Add together the closing balance from each checking-account statement in the file — what is the grand total?

qa.question: What is the representative credit score?
qa.question_rephrased: Which value is recorded as the representative credit score?

qa.question: How many transactions are listed across all checking statements combined?
qa.question_rephrased: Taking every checking statement together, what is the total number of transactions listed?

qa.question: What are the W-2 box 1 (wages) for the borrower?
qa.question_rephrased: For the borrower, what wages figure is reported in box 1 of the W-2?

qa.question: What is the borrower's front-end (housing) DTI shown on the loan summary's debt-to-income chart?
qa.question_rephrased: Per the debt-to-income chart on the loan summary, what front-end (housing) DTI is reported for the borrower?

qa.question: What is the highest daily ending balance shown on the bank statement's daily-balance chart?
qa.question_rephrased: Which figure is the peak daily ending balance plotted on the bank statement's daily-balance chart?

qa.question: How many total pages are in this loan file?
qa.question_rephrased: What is the overall page count of this loan file?

qa.question: On what date does the appraiser's professional license expire?
qa.question_rephrased: When is the expiration date of the appraiser's professional license?

qa.question: What was the subject property's prior sale price?
qa.question_rephrased: At what price was the subject property previously sold?

qa.question: On the bank statement's daily-balance chart, how much did the balance change from the start to the end of the period?
qa.question_rephrased: Using the daily-balance chart on the bank statement, what is the net change in balance between the opening and closing of the period?

qa.question: The file contains 9 paystubs. On the MOST RECENT paystub (by pay date), what is the year-to-date gross pay?
qa.question_rephrased: There are 9 paystubs in the file; on the one with the latest pay date, what gross pay is shown year-to-date?

qa.question: Do the W-2 box 1 wages reconcile with the wages on the Form 1040? State the reconciled amount.
qa.question_rephrased: Check whether the box 1 wages on the W-2 agree with the wages reported on the Form 1040, and give the amount they reconcile to.

qa.question: On the credit report's revolving-utilization chart, identify the account with the highest utilization, then report that account's MONTHLY PAYMENT from the tradeline table.
qa.question_rephrased: Find the account showing the greatest utilization on the credit report's revolving-utilization chart, then look up its monthly payment in the tradeline table — what is that payment?

qa.question: Over the statement period shown on the bank statement's daily-balance chart, did the balance trend upward, downward, or stay flat?
qa.question_rephrased: Across the period depicted on the bank statement's daily-balance chart, was the balance's overall direction rising, falling, or flat?

qa.question: The representative credit score appears on both the credit report and the Form 1008. What is the reconciled score?
qa.question_rephrased: Both the credit report and the Form 1008 list the representative credit score; what score do the two agree on?

qa.question: There are 14 checking statements. What is the ending balance on the MOST RECENT one (period 02/08/2024–03/07/2024)?
qa.question_rephrased: Of the 14 checking statements, the latest covers 02/08/2024–03/07/2024 — what closing balance does it show?

qa.question: What is the single largest deposit found on any checking statement in the file?
qa.question_rephrased: Across all the checking statements in the file, what is the biggest individual deposit recorded?

qa.question: The single largest holding shown on the brokerage statement's asset-allocation chart — how many shares of it does the account hold per the holdings table?
qa.question_rephrased: For the largest holding depicted in the brokerage statement's asset-allocation chart, what share quantity does the holdings table list for that position?

qa.question: Locate the bank statement whose daily-balance chart hit the highest peak of any statement in the file; how many transactions are listed on that statement?
qa.question_rephrased: Identify which statement's daily-balance chart reaches the tallest peak among all statements in the file, then state how many transactions that statement lists.

qa.question: The largest slice of the PITI pie on the loan summary is principal & interest; what is that monthly P&I amount, and confirm it ties to the Closing Disclosure's projected payment.
qa.question_rephrased: Principal & interest is the biggest wedge of the PITI pie on the loan summary — state that monthly P&I figure and verify it matches the projected payment on the Closing Disclosure.

qa.question: Which checking statement has the highest ending balance, and what is that balance?
qa.question_rephrased: Of all the checking statements, which finishes with the largest closing balance, and what does that balance come to?

qa.question: How many distinct document types appear in this loan file?
qa.question_rephrased: Counting each unique kind only once, how many different document types are present in this loan file?

qa.question: What is the total monthly housing payment (PITI)?
qa.question_rephrased: How much is the full monthly housing payment, inclusive of PITI?

qa.question: How many pages does the single longest document in this file span?
qa.question_rephrased: The longest single document in this file runs across how many pages?

qa.question: How many separate paystubs are included in this loan file?
qa.question_rephrased: What is the number of individual paystubs found in this loan file?

qa.question: What is the combined total of deposits across all checking statements?
qa.question_rephrased: Summing deposits over every checking statement, what aggregate deposit total results?
